name: kblocks
description: KBlocks is the classic falling blocks game. The idea is to stack the falling blocks to create horizontal lines without any gaps. When a line is completed it is removed, and more space is available in the play area. When there is not enough space for blocks to fall, the game is over. This game is part of the KDE Games suite. USAGE (from the command line): kdegames -h (shows the list of games) kdegames $GAME (launches the selected game)
